channel.title: Non-WordPress pages (pages created in React) and SEO
channel.description:
For pages within Frontity, those not created from WP backend, what's the recommended way to add SEO meta descriptions, structured data, etc? Would you recommend React Helmet or some other type of utility? https://github.com/nfl/react-helmet
Thanks!

item.title: Non-WordPress pages (pages created in React) and SEO
item.dc:creator: justin
item.description:
Cool, no matter how many times I think I’ve read the docs, I still miss stuff. Appreciate it!

Read full topic
item.source: Non-WordPress pages (pages created in React) and SEO

item.title: Non-WordPress pages (pages created in React) and SEO
item.dc:creator: mmczaplinski
item.description:
Hi @justin !

Frontity already comes with a built-in solution to manage the meta content in the <head> of your site which is in fact using react-helmet under the hood: https://docs.frontity.org/learning-frontity/head !

Hope this helps!

Read full topic
item.source: Non-WordPress pages (pages created in React) and SEO
